Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Or In The Alternative Motion For Leave To Record Second Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Serot, Esq. of VLA&A (415-291-8844) for Plaintiff/Moving party Dilipkumar Patel.
William Balin, Esq. of Balin & Kotler, LLP (415-241-7360) for Defendant/opposing party Ann Cazahous.
Court reporter: Suzanne Andrade, CSR #. 10682, (415-597-5600), Reported, (501).

The Court informs both parties the leaning of the Court to deny the motion for reconsideration and that the Court is not certain on what to do on the motion for leave to record second lis pendens. The Court informs the moving party of it's burden. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DILIPKUMAR PATEL'S Motion For Reconsideration Or In The Alternative Motion For Leave To Record Second Lis Pendens is taken under submission (as fully reported in the reporter's notes).Both parties to submit proposed orders with 3 possibilities - deny/deny; grant/moot; deny/grant. Plaintiff submits 2 proposed orders. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Suzanne Andrade, CSR #. 10682, (415-597-5600) Reported, (501).
